query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.programId, a.turmaId, u.id as uid, u.name as u_name, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId as u_programId, u.alunoId FROM users u LEFT JOIN alunos a ON u.alunoId = a.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Joseane%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.programId, a.turmaId, u.id as uid, u.name as u_name, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId as u_programId, u.alunoId FROM users u LEFT JOIN alunos a ON u.alunoId = a.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Joseane%';
